articles.author: Kumar
articles.title: UAE Holds 19 Indians Over Fake Social Media Posts - Gulte
articles.description: Over 35 social media influencers, including 19 Indians, were arrested by the UAE authorities for publishing video clips that contained fabricated content on the Middle East tension, which could incite the public and create disorder. UAE official news agency W…
